issues.description: First ReturnToHand action targets own Character but card text says 'You may return 1 of your Characters' as a cost/condition, not an effect. This should be a condition, not an action.

Second ReturnToHand targets opponent Character, but card text says 'Return up to 1 Character' without specifying opponent. In OPTCG context, this should target opponent's Character. However, the structure is wrong: the first return should be optional cost, second should be the main effect.
DrawCard action with Trigger trigger has no justification in card text. No draw effect is mentioned in the official text.
Trigger 'Activated' should specify this is a Main Phase effect. Card explicitly states '[Main]' which indicates timing constraint.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 6 or less to the owner's hand.
